title: Mediterranean Chickpea Salad
ingredients: 240 g chickpeas; 1 cucumber diced; 2 tomatoes diced; 2 tbsp olive oil; 1 tbsp lemon juice
steps: Dice cucumber and tomatoes. | Combine ingredients in a mixing bowl. | Mix and serve chilled.
nutrition_per_serving: 250 kcal; protein 10 g; fat 12 g; carbohydrates 28 g

title: Vegetable Omelette
steps: Beat eggs and add spinach and cheese. | Cook the mixture in a pan until set.
nutrition_per_serving: 310 kcal; protein 22 g; fat 22 g; carbohydrates 4 g

title: Chicken Rice Bowl
ingredients: 250 g chicken breast; 180 g rice; 150 g broccoli
steps: Boil rice and broccoli until tender. | Cook chicken breast and serve with rice and broccoli.
nutrition_per_serving: 520 kcal; protein 42 g; fat 12 g; carbohydrates 58 g
